products.title: Hydro Flask 32 oz Wide Mouth Water Bottle
products.script_summary: The Hydro Flask 32oz keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12. Durable, leak-proof, and backed by a lifetime warranty — over 89k five-star reviews.

products.title: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Electric Pressure Cooker
products.script_summary: The Instant Pot Duo replaces 7 kitchen appliances and cuts cook times by up to 70%. Over 145k five-star reviews make it the best-selling pressure cooker on Amazon.
